caption: we from Rhinoceropolis and Glob have all been displaced after getting force evicted from our studios of residence on dec 9, with no refund on our rent from the landlord or city of Denver that was paid by us all for the full month of dec . if you are one or many with extra dollars to distribute this amongst us for cost of rent and living expenses , please donate to this link so that we can all continue to FSU and crash this real estate & nature murdering piece of shit global power structure . 🙏 https://www.generosity.com/emergencies-fundraising/help-the-residents-of-glob-and-rhinoceropolis
